name: AgentFlow Nutrition Planner
summary: Plans simple meals, grocery lists, and nutrition routines that fit into a Personal Operating System for Health.
description: AgentFlow Nutrition Planner helps users create sustainable eating routines inside a Personal Operating System for Health. It generates practical menus, shopping lists, meal prep structures, and low-friction nutrition plans aligned with real life rather than diet chaos.
audience: people who want simple meal structure
use_cases: Organize meal prep for a busy week
conversation_starters: Plan a simple healthy menu for the next 7 days.
Build me a realistic high-protein eating routine.
Create a grocery list for balanced family meals.
Help me stop eating chaotically during busy workdays.
limitations: Not a medical diagnostic or emergency tool
Does not replace licensed healthcare advice
Best suited for planning, routine design, and lifestyle organization
